core.title: Wadi Rum Jeep Tour: Hurghada Desert Safari & Fire Show
core.excerpt: This Wadi Rum Jeep Tour offers an unforgettable desert adventure...
core.content_html:
Overview

Embark on the ultimate desert adventure with our unforgettable Wadi Rum jeep tour from Hurghada. This thrilling excursion combines adrenaline-pumping action with authentic cultural immersion. Experience the magic of the Egyptian desert like never before. Your journey begins with an exhilarating 4×4 jeep ride across breathtaking sand dunes. Feel the rush of off-road driving while taking in panoramic desert views. This Wadi Rum jeep tour offers the perfect blend of excitement and discovery. Next, swap wheels for a traditional camel ride through the serene wilderness. Capture stunning photos of the vast desert landscape during this peaceful experience. Then, visit an authentic Bedouin village to learn about local culture and traditions. Enjoy a delicious BBQ dinner under a canopy of stars in a traditional tent. The evening culminates with a spectacular fire show that lights up the night sky. This Wadi Rum jeep tour creates memories that will last a lifetime. It’s the perfect adventure for thrill-seekers and culture enthusiasts alike. Book your spot on this incredible desert safari today!

cost.cost_includes:
Tour guide during the desert safari
20-minute buggy ride
Traditional camel ride through the desert landscape
Hotel pickup and drop-off in Hurghada
Exploration of an authentic Bedouin village
FTS Scarve (Optional add-on - $10)
FTS Organic oils - 100% pure (Optional add-on - $10)
BBQ dinner with Tanoura and fire show
Desert sunset viewing experience
Test drive on the quad bike before beginning the safari
Visit to a Bedouin Camp with traditional tea
30-minute ATV/quad bike ride
Jeep and dune safari
Shared Photographer per person (Optional add-on - $30)
cost.cost_excludes:
Any extras not mentioned
Gratuities and tips
Travel insurance
Personal expenses
Pickup and drop-off from Makadi Bay, Sahl Hasheesh, El Gouna, Safaga, and Soma Bay (available for extra charge)
Scarf (unless purchased as add-on)

faq_title: How do I book the Hurghada Jeep and ATV Quad tour with dinner?
What makes your desert fire show and dinner experience special?
Is the desert safari safe for children and older adults?
How much cash should I bring for extras and tips?
What's included in the BBQ dinner and can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
How large are the tour groups and what languages are available?
What should I wear and bring for the desert adventure?
What happens if there's bad weather on my tour day?
What happens if I need to cancel my booking?
How long is the ATV ride and do I need prior experience?
Where and when is the hotel pickup for this tour?
What fitness level do I need for the ATV and buggy rides?
faq_content: You can book this desert adventure directly through our website for instant confirmation. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to secure your spot, especially during busy seasons when our tours fill up quickly.

Our fire show happens under the star-filled desert sky, creating a magical atmosphere you won't find elsewhere. Combined with authentic Bedouin hospitality, traditional Tanoura dancing, and a delicious BBQ dinner, it's the perfect ending to an adventurous day. Many guests say this evening experience is their favorite memory of Egypt.

Yes, this tour is family-friendly and suitable for most ages. Children must be accompanied by adults, and we adjust activities for safety. Older adults who are reasonably mobile enjoy the experience — the camel ride and dinner are particularly gentle, while the adventure activities are optional at your comfort level.

Bring some Egyptian pounds for personal expenses, souvenirs at the Bedouin camp, and tips for guides and drivers (tipping is appreciated but optional). If you're staying in Makadi Bay, Sahl Hasheesh, El Gouna, Safaga, or Soma Bay, there's an additional €10 per person charge for pickup.

The BBQ dinner features fresh Egyptian flavors served in a traditional Bedouin tent, complete with Tanoura and fire show entertainment. If you have dietary restrictions, please notify us when booking — we can often accommodate vegetarian, gluten-free, or other needs with advance notice.

We keep groups manageable for personalized attention, typically 10-15 people. Your guide speaks English, French, German, Spanish, or Italian — you'll be matched with a guide who speaks your preferred language. This ensures clear communication throughout your desert experience.

Wear comfortable, closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting dusty (light layers work well). Bring sunglasses, sunscreen, and a camera — we provide secure storage for your belongings during activities. Consider bringing a scarf for extra dust protection, though it's not included.

Desert tours typically run regardless of light rain, but we cancel for severe weather or sandstorms. If we cancel due to weather, you'll receive a full refund or option to reschedule. We monitor conditions closely and make decisions based on safety — you'll be notified promptly if changes are needed.

If you need to cancel your booking, don’t worry—you can cancel at any time. You’ll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Please contact our customer service team and we’ll be happy to help you cancel or reschedule.

You'll enjoy 30 minutes of independent ATV exploration after a thorough practice session. No prior experience is needed — our guides teach you everything from starting the engine to navigating dunes safely. Many guests are first-time riders who leave feeling confident and exhilarated by the desert freedom.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby at 2:00 PM. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation, ensuring a hassle-free start. You’ll receive confirmation details after booking.

This tour is designed for most fitness levels — you don't need to be an athlete to enjoy it. We start with a comprehensive quad bike practice session to build your confidence, and our guides adjust the pace to match the group's comfort level. Even first-timers typically master the basics quickly.

itinerary_title.1: Afternoon (2:00 PM) – Hotel Pickup | 🚐 Transfer | Desert Adventure Begins
itinerary_title.2: Afternoon (2:30 PM) – Desert Base Camp | 🎯 Activity | Quad Bike Practice Session
itinerary_title.3: Afternoon (3:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Independent ATV Adventure
itinerary_title.4: Afternoon (3:30 PM) – Sandy Trails | 🎯 Activity | Shared Buggy Experience
itinerary_title.5: Late Afternoon (3:50 PM) – Vast Desert | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Jeep Desert Safari
itinerary_title.6: Late Afternoon (4:30 PM) – Traditional Settlement | 🏛️ Visit | Cultural Immersion
itinerary_title.7: Late Afternoon (5:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Sunset Camel Experience
itinerary_title.8: Evening (5:30 PM) – Traditional Camp | 🎯 Activity | Cultural Hospitality
itinerary_title.9: Evening (6:00 PM) – Desert Vista | 📸 Photo Stop | ⭐ Highlight | Golden Hour
itinerary_title.10: Evening (6:30 PM) – Bedouin Tent | 🍽️ Meal | ⭐ Highlight | Traditional Feast
itinerary_title.11: Evening (7:30 PM) – Desert Night | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Desert Fire Show Tour
itinerary_title.12: Evening (8:00 PM) – Hotel Return | 🚐 Transfer | Journey Conclusion

itinerary_content.1: Your desert jeep tour adventure starts with a comfortable pickup from your Hurghada hotel. You'll meet your friendly guide and fellow adventurers as you're driven toward the vast Egyptian desert, feeling the anticipation build for the thrilling experiences ahead.
itinerary_content.2: Arrive at the desert base camp where your adventure vehicles await. Test your skills on a quad bike during a comprehensive practice session, building confidence on the sandy terrain under expert guidance before your main desert exploration begins.
itinerary_content.3: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across vast golden sands. Experience the freedom of navigating challenging terrain as you follow your guide through breathtaking desert landscapes.
itinerary_content.4: Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together. Feel the adrenaline rush as you conquer dunes in these powerful off-road vehicles before continuing deeper into the desert.
itinerary_content.5: Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your skilled driver. Experience the rush of a true desert jeep tour as you traverse challenging terrain, feeling the vehicle's power beneath you on this authentic jeep desert safari.
itinerary_content.6: Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your jeep adventure, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants. Discover how these resilient people have thrived in the harsh desert environment for centuries.
itinerary_content.7: Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience. Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.
itinerary_content.8: Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight. This authentic experience connects you with desert traditions while you relax after your adventures.
itinerary_content.9: Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner. The sky transforms through shades of orange, pink, and purple, casting magical light across the endless dunes—a perfect moment for photography and reflection.
itinerary_content.10: Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures. This mouth-watering Egyptian meal in a traditional Bedouin-style tent features grilled meats, fresh salads, and authentic local dishes.
itinerary_content.11: Be amazed by the exciting and colorful fire show that takes place under the stars. Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky during this unforgettable desert fire show tour.
itinerary_content.12: Board your comfortable vehicle for the return journey to Hurghada, reflecting on your incredible desert adventures. You'll be dropped off at your hotel with unforgettable memories of your jeep tour wadi rum-style desert experience.

Overview

tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Why People Love This Trip

*The Ultimate Desert Adventure* ⭐
Travelers rave about the perfect combination of adrenaline and culture in this Wadi Rum jeep tour. You'll experience multiple desert activities in one unforgettable package. From 4x4 jeep thrills to peaceful camel rides, every moment is magical.

*Hassle-Free Desert Experience* 🚐
We handle all logistics so you can focus on enjoying your adventure. With hotel pickup included and expert guides managing every detail, your desert safari is completely stress-free. This Wadi Rum jeep tour makes desert exploration accessible and comfortable.

*Expert Desert Guides* 👨‍🏫
Our knowledgeable guides share fascinating insights about desert life and Bedouin culture. They ensure your safety while maximizing your enjoyment of every activity. Guests consistently praise their professionalism and engaging storytelling.

*Incredible Value Package* 💰
This Wadi Rum jeep tour packs multiple experiences into one reasonable price. You get jeep safari, quad biking, camel riding, dinner, and entertainment all included. Travelers love getting so much adventure for their investment.

*Authentic Cultural Connection* 🎯
Unlike basic desert tours, we include genuine Bedouin camp visits and traditional performances. You'll experience real desert hospitality and learn about centuries-old traditions. This cultural depth makes our Wadi Rum jeep tour truly special.

*Magical Desert Memories* ❤️
Guests describe feeling awe-inspired watching the sunset over endless dunes. The combination of thrilling activities and peaceful moments creates emotional memories. You'll leave with stories of adventure and beautiful desert photographs.

*Perfect for Everyone* 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
This Wadi Rum jeep tour delights adventure seekers, couples, families, and solo travelers alike. The variety of activities ensures everyone finds something they love. Whether you seek thrills or cultural immersion, this tour delivers exactly what you want.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across golden sands before sunset.
Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight.
Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky.
Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your guide before arriving at the traditional Bedouin village.
Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together before dinner.
Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience.
Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures.
Test your skills on a quad bike during a practice session, building confidence before venturing deeper into the desert's challenging terrain.
Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your camel ride, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants.
Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.

wp_travel_engine_setting.trip_itinerary_description:
Itinerary

Your Wadi Rum jeep tour adventure begins with convenient hotel pickup in Hurghada. Travel comfortably to the desert starting point for your safari. Receive a safety briefing and test drive on your quad bike before beginning.

Morning: Desert Thrills & Exploration

Embark on your jeep desert safari through stunning sand dunes. Experience the thrill of 4x4 off-road driving across vast landscapes. Enjoy approximately 30 minutes of exhilarating quad bike riding through the desert. Continue with 20 minutes of exciting buggy riding across challenging terrain.

Afternoon: Cultural Immersion & Relaxation

Visit a traditional Bedouin camp to experience local hospitality. Enjoy authentic Bedouin tea while learning about desert traditions. Take a peaceful camel ride through the serene desert surroundings. Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner.

Evening: Dinner & Entertainment

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner in a traditional Bedouin-style tent. Enjoy a mouth-watering Egyptian meal featuring fresh local dishes. Be amazed by the exciting Tanoura dance performance under the stars. Witness the spectacular desert fire show that lights up the night sky. Conclude your Wadi Rum jeep tour with comfortable return transfer to your hotel.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Capture every thrilling moment of your desert safari with a professional photographer, ensuring you take home stunning, high-quality memories of your quad rides, sunset views, and the spectacular fire show.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Enhance your wellness with pure, high-quality organic oils sourced locally in Egypt, perfect as a natural souvenir or for personal aromatherapy after your desert journey.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Scarve
descriptions: Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf, offering essential protection from the desert sun and sand while adding a touch of traditional style to your adventure photos.

itinerary_content.1: Your desert jeep tour adventure starts with a comfortable pickup from your Hurghada hotel. You'll meet your friendly guide and fellow adventurers as you're driven toward the vast Egyptian desert, feeling the anticipation build for the thrilling experiences ahead.
itinerary_content.2: Arrive at the desert base camp where your adventure vehicles await. Test your skills on a quad bike during a comprehensive practice session, building confidence on the sandy terrain under expert guidance before your main desert exploration begins.
itinerary_content.3: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across vast golden sands. Experience the freedom of navigating challenging terrain as you follow your guide through breathtaking desert landscapes.
itinerary_content.4: Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together. Feel the adrenaline rush as you conquer dunes in these powerful off-road vehicles before continuing deeper into the desert.
itinerary_content.5: Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your skilled driver. Experience the rush of a true desert jeep tour as you traverse challenging terrain, feeling the vehicle's power beneath you on this authentic jeep desert safari.
itinerary_content.6: Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your jeep adventure, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants. Discover how these resilient people have thrived in the harsh desert environment for centuries.
itinerary_content.7: Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience. Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.
itinerary_content.8: Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight. This authentic experience connects you with desert traditions while you relax after your adventures.
itinerary_content.9: Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner. The sky transforms through shades of orange, pink, and purple, casting magical light across the endless dunes—a perfect moment for photography and reflection.
itinerary_content.10: Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures. This mouth-watering Egyptian meal in a traditional Bedouin-style tent features grilled meats, fresh salads, and authentic local dishes.
itinerary_content.11: Be amazed by the exciting and colorful fire show that takes place under the stars. Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky during this unforgettable desert fire show tour.
itinerary_content.12: Board your comfortable vehicle for the return journey to Hurghada, reflecting on your incredible desert adventures. You'll be dropped off at your hotel with unforgettable memories of your jeep tour wadi rum-style desert experience.

tab_content.1_wpeditor:
Overview

Embark on the ultimate desert adventure with our unforgettable Wadi Rum jeep tour from Hurghada. This thrilling excursion combines adrenaline-pumping action with authentic cultural immersion. Experience the magic of the Egyptian desert like never before. Your journey begins with an exhilarating 4x4 jeep ride across breathtaking sand dunes. Feel the rush of off-road driving while taking in panoramic desert views. This Wadi Rum jeep tour offers the perfect blend of excitement and discovery. Next, swap wheels for a traditional camel ride through the serene wilderness. Capture stunning photos of the vast desert landscape during this peaceful experience. Then, visit an authentic Bedouin village to learn about local culture and traditions. Enjoy a delicious BBQ dinner under a canopy of stars in a traditional tent. The evening culminates with a spectacular fire show that lights up the night sky. This Wadi Rum jeep tour creates memories that will last a lifetime. It's the perfect adventure for thrill-seekers and culture enthusiasts alike. Book your spot on this incredible desert safari today!
tab_content.8_wpeditor:
Why People Love This Trip

*The Ultimate Desert Adventure* ⭐
Travelers rave about the perfect combination of adrenaline and culture in this Wadi Rum jeep tour. You'll experience multiple desert activities in one unforgettable package. From 4x4 jeep thrills to peaceful camel rides, every moment is magical.

*Hassle-Free Desert Experience* 🚐
We handle all logistics so you can focus on enjoying your adventure. With hotel pickup included and expert guides managing every detail, your desert safari is completely stress-free. This Wadi Rum jeep tour makes desert exploration accessible and comfortable.

*Expert Desert Guides* 👨‍🏫
Our knowledgeable guides share fascinating insights about desert life and Bedouin culture. They ensure your safety while maximizing your enjoyment of every activity. Guests consistently praise their professionalism and engaging storytelling.

*Incredible Value Package* 💰
This Wadi Rum jeep tour packs multiple experiences into one reasonable price. You get jeep safari, quad biking, camel riding, dinner, and entertainment all included. Travelers love getting so much adventure for their investment.

*Authentic Cultural Connection* 🎯
Unlike basic desert tours, we include genuine Bedouin camp visits and traditional performances. You'll experience real desert hospitality and learn about centuries-old traditions. This cultural depth makes our Wadi Rum jeep tour truly special.

*Magical Desert Memories* ❤️
Guests describe feeling awe-inspired watching the sunset over endless dunes. The combination of thrilling activities and peaceful moments creates emotional memories. You'll leave with stories of adventure and beautiful desert photographs.

*Perfect for Everyone* 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
This Wadi Rum jeep tour delights adventure seekers, couples, families, and solo travelers alike. The variety of activities ensures everyone finds something they love. Whether you seek thrills or cultural immersion, this tour delivers exactly what you want.

trip_highlights.highlight_text: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across golden sands before sunset.
Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight.
Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky.
Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your guide before arriving at the traditional Bedouin village.
Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together before dinner.
Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience.
Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures.
Test your skills on a quad bike during a practice session, building confidence before venturing deeper into the desert's challenging terrain.
Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your camel ride, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants.
Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.

raw.trip_itinerary_description:
Itinerary

Your Wadi Rum jeep tour adventure begins with convenient hotel pickup in Hurghada. Travel comfortably to the desert starting point for your safari. Receive a safety briefing and test drive on your quad bike before beginning.

Morning: Desert Thrills & Exploration

Embark on your jeep desert safari through stunning sand dunes. Experience the thrill of 4x4 off-road driving across vast landscapes. Enjoy approximately 30 minutes of exhilarating quad bike riding through the desert. Continue with 20 minutes of exciting buggy riding across challenging terrain.

Afternoon: Cultural Immersion & Relaxation

Visit a traditional Bedouin camp to experience local hospitality. Enjoy authentic Bedouin tea while learning about desert traditions. Take a peaceful camel ride through the serene desert surroundings. Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner.

Evening: Dinner & Entertainment

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner in a traditional Bedouin-style tent. Enjoy a mouth-watering Egyptian meal featuring fresh local dishes. Be amazed by the exciting Tanoura dance performance under the stars. Witness the spectacular desert fire show that lights up the night sky. Conclude your Wadi Rum jeep tour with comfortable return transfer to your hotel.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Capture every thrilling moment of your desert safari with a professional photographer, ensuring you take home stunning, high-quality memories of your quad rides, sunset views, and the spectacular fire show.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Enhance your wellness with pure, high-quality organic oils sourced locally in Egypt, perfect as a natural souvenir or for personal aromatherapy after your desert journey.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Scarve
descriptions: Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf, offering essential protection from the desert sun and sand while adding a touch of traditional style to your adventure photos.

faq_title: How do I book the Hurghada Jeep and ATV Quad tour with dinner?
What makes your desert fire show and dinner experience special?
Is the desert safari safe for children and older adults?
How much cash should I bring for extras and tips?
What's included in the BBQ dinner and can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
How large are the tour groups and what languages are available?
What should I wear and bring for the desert adventure?
What happens if there's bad weather on my tour day?
What happens if I need to cancel my booking?
How long is the ATV ride and do I need prior experience?
Where and when is the hotel pickup for this tour?
What fitness level do I need for the ATV and buggy rides?
faq_content: You can book this desert adventure directly through our website for instant confirmation. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to secure your spot, especially during busy seasons when our tours fill up quickly.

Our fire show happens under the star-filled desert sky, creating a magical atmosphere you won't find elsewhere. Combined with authentic Bedouin hospitality, traditional Tanoura dancing, and a delicious BBQ dinner, it's the perfect ending to an adventurous day. Many guests say this evening experience is their favorite memory of Egypt.

Yes, this tour is family-friendly and suitable for most ages. Children must be accompanied by adults, and we adjust activities for safety. Older adults who are reasonably mobile enjoy the experience — the camel ride and dinner are particularly gentle, while the adventure activities are optional at your comfort level.

Bring some Egyptian pounds for personal expenses, souvenirs at the Bedouin camp, and tips for guides and drivers (tipping is appreciated but optional). If you're staying in Makadi Bay, Sahl Hasheesh, El Gouna, Safaga, or Soma Bay, there's an additional €10 per person charge for pickup.

The BBQ dinner features fresh Egyptian flavors served in a traditional Bedouin tent, complete with Tanoura and fire show entertainment. If you have dietary restrictions, please notify us when booking — we can often accommodate vegetarian, gluten-free, or other needs with advance notice.

We keep groups manageable for personalized attention, typically 10-15 people. Your guide speaks English, French, German, Spanish, or Italian — you'll be matched with a guide who speaks your preferred language. This ensures clear communication throughout your desert experience.

Wear comfortable, closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting dusty (light layers work well). Bring sunglasses, sunscreen, and a camera — we provide secure storage for your belongings during activities. Consider bringing a scarf for extra dust protection, though it's not included.

Desert tours typically run regardless of light rain, but we cancel for severe weather or sandstorms. If we cancel due to weather, you'll receive a full refund or option to reschedule. We monitor conditions closely and make decisions based on safety — you'll be notified promptly if changes are needed.

If you need to cancel your booking, don’t worry—you can cancel at any time. You’ll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Please contact our customer service team and we’ll be happy to help you cancel or reschedule.

You'll enjoy 30 minutes of independent ATV exploration after a thorough practice session. No prior experience is needed — our guides teach you everything from starting the engine to navigating dunes safely. Many guests are first-time riders who leave feeling confident and exhilarated by the desert freedom.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby at 2:00 PM. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation, ensuring a hassle-free start. You’ll receive confirmation details after booking.

This tour is designed for most fitness levels — you don't need to be an athlete to enjoy it. We start with a comprehensive quad bike practice session to build your confidence, and our guides adjust the pace to match the group's comfort level. Even first-timers typically master the basics quickly.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (2:00 PM) – Hotel Pickup | 🚐 Transfer | Desert Adventure Begins
trip_itinerary.content: Your desert jeep tour adventure starts with a comfortable pickup from your Hurghada hotel. You'll meet your friendly guide and fellow adventurers as you're driven toward the vast Egyptian desert, feeling the anticipation build for the thrilling experiences ahead.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (2:30 PM) – Desert Base Camp | 🎯 Activity | Quad Bike Practice Session
trip_itinerary.content: Arrive at the desert base camp where your adventure vehicles await. Test your skills on a quad bike during a comprehensive practice session, building confidence on the sandy terrain under expert guidance before your main desert exploration begins.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (3:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Independent ATV Adventure
trip_itinerary.content: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across vast golden sands. Experience the freedom of navigating challenging terrain as you follow your guide through breathtaking desert landscapes.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (3:30 PM) – Sandy Trails | 🎯 Activity | Shared Buggy Experience
trip_itinerary.content: Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together. Feel the adrenaline rush as you conquer dunes in these powerful off-road vehicles before continuing deeper into the desert.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (3:50 PM) – Vast Desert | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Jeep Desert Safari
trip_itinerary.content: Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your skilled driver. Experience the rush of a true desert jeep tour as you traverse challenging terrain, feeling the vehicle's power beneath you on this authentic jeep desert safari.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (4:30 PM) – Traditional Settlement | 🏛️ Visit | Cultural Immersion
trip_itinerary.content: Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your jeep adventure, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants. Discover how these resilient people have thrived in the harsh desert environment for centuries.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (5:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Sunset Camel Experience
trip_itinerary.content: Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience. Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (5:30 PM) – Traditional Camp | 🎯 Activity | Cultural Hospitality
trip_itinerary.content: Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight. This authentic experience connects you with desert traditions while you relax after your adventures.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (6:00 PM) – Desert Vista | 📸 Photo Stop | ⭐ Highlight | Golden Hour
trip_itinerary.content: Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner. The sky transforms through shades of orange, pink, and purple, casting magical light across the endless dunes—a perfect moment for photography and reflection.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (6:30 PM) – Bedouin Tent | 🍽️ Meal | ⭐ Highlight | Traditional Feast
trip_itinerary.content: Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures. This mouth-watering Egyptian meal in a traditional Bedouin-style tent features grilled meats, fresh salads, and authentic local dishes.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (7:30 PM) – Desert Night | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Desert Fire Show Tour
trip_itinerary.content: Be amazed by the exciting and colorful fire show that takes place under the stars. Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky during this unforgettable desert fire show tour.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (8:00 PM) – Hotel Return | 🚐 Transfer | Journey Conclusion
trip_itinerary.content: Board your comfortable vehicle for the return journey to Hurghada, reflecting on your incredible desert adventures. You'll be dropped off at your hotel with unforgettable memories of your jeep tour wadi rum-style desert experience.

Morning: Desert Thrills & Exploration

Embark on your jeep desert safari through stunning sand dunes. Experience the thrill of 4x4 off-road driving across vast landscapes. Enjoy approximately 30 minutes of exhilarating quad bike riding through the desert. Continue with 20 minutes of exciting buggy riding across challenging terrain.

Afternoon: Cultural Immersion & Relaxation

Visit a traditional Bedouin camp to experience local hospitality. Enjoy authentic Bedouin tea while learning about desert traditions. Take a peaceful camel ride through the serene desert surroundings. Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner.

Evening: Dinner & Entertainment

Savor a delicious BBQ dinner in a traditional Bedouin-style tent. Enjoy a mouth-watering Egyptian meal featuring fresh local dishes. Be amazed by the exciting Tanoura dance performance under the stars. Witness the spectacular desert fire show that lights up the night sky. Conclude your Wadi Rum jeep tour with comfortable return transfer to your hotel.

trip_extra_services.label: Shared Photographer per person
descriptions: Capture every thrilling moment of your desert safari with a professional photographer, ensuring you take home stunning, high-quality memories of your quad rides, sunset views, and the spectacular fire show.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Organic oils " Organic 100%
descriptions: Enhance your wellness with pure, high-quality organic oils sourced locally in Egypt, perfect as a natural souvenir or for personal aromatherapy after your desert journey.

trip_extra_services.label: FTS Scarve
descriptions: Wrap yourself in an authentic Egyptian scarf, offering essential protection from the desert sun and sand while adding a touch of traditional style to your adventure photos.

faq_title: How do I book the Hurghada Jeep and ATV Quad tour with dinner?
What makes your desert fire show and dinner experience special?
Is the desert safari safe for children and older adults?
How much cash should I bring for extras and tips?
What's included in the BBQ dinner and can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
How large are the tour groups and what languages are available?
What should I wear and bring for the desert adventure?
What happens if there's bad weather on my tour day?
What happens if I need to cancel my booking?
How long is the ATV ride and do I need prior experience?
Where and when is the hotel pickup for this tour?
What fitness level do I need for the ATV and buggy rides?
faq_content: You can book this desert adventure directly through our website for instant confirmation. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to secure your spot, especially during busy seasons when our tours fill up quickly.

Our fire show happens under the star-filled desert sky, creating a magical atmosphere you won't find elsewhere. Combined with authentic Bedouin hospitality, traditional Tanoura dancing, and a delicious BBQ dinner, it's the perfect ending to an adventurous day. Many guests say this evening experience is their favorite memory of Egypt.

Yes, this tour is family-friendly and suitable for most ages. Children must be accompanied by adults, and we adjust activities for safety. Older adults who are reasonably mobile enjoy the experience — the camel ride and dinner are particularly gentle, while the adventure activities are optional at your comfort level.

Bring some Egyptian pounds for personal expenses, souvenirs at the Bedouin camp, and tips for guides and drivers (tipping is appreciated but optional). If you're staying in Makadi Bay, Sahl Hasheesh, El Gouna, Safaga, or Soma Bay, there's an additional €10 per person charge for pickup.

The BBQ dinner features fresh Egyptian flavors served in a traditional Bedouin tent, complete with Tanoura and fire show entertainment. If you have dietary restrictions, please notify us when booking — we can often accommodate vegetarian, gluten-free, or other needs with advance notice.

We keep groups manageable for personalized attention, typically 10-15 people. Your guide speaks English, French, German, Spanish, or Italian — you'll be matched with a guide who speaks your preferred language. This ensures clear communication throughout your desert experience.

Wear comfortable, closed-toe shoes and clothes you don't mind getting dusty (light layers work well). Bring sunglasses, sunscreen, and a camera — we provide secure storage for your belongings during activities. Consider bringing a scarf for extra dust protection, though it's not included.

Desert tours typically run regardless of light rain, but we cancel for severe weather or sandstorms. If we cancel due to weather, you'll receive a full refund or option to reschedule. We monitor conditions closely and make decisions based on safety — you'll be notified promptly if changes are needed.

If you need to cancel your booking, don’t worry—you can cancel at any time. You’ll receive a full refund if you cancel at least 24 hours before the scheduled trip. Please contact our customer service team and we’ll be happy to help you cancel or reschedule.

You'll enjoy 30 minutes of independent ATV exploration after a thorough practice session. No prior experience is needed — our guides teach you everything from starting the engine to navigating dunes safely. Many guests are first-time riders who leave feeling confident and exhilarated by the desert freedom.

We provide convenient hotel pickup directly from your hotel lobby at 2:00 PM. Your guide will meet you there with comfortable air-conditioned transportation, ensuring a hassle-free start. You’ll receive confirmation details after booking.

This tour is designed for most fitness levels — you don't need to be an athlete to enjoy it. We start with a comprehensive quad bike practice session to build your confidence, and our guides adjust the pace to match the group's comfort level. Even first-timers typically master the basics quickly.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (2:00 PM) – Hotel Pickup | 🚐 Transfer | Desert Adventure Begins
trip_itinerary.content: Your desert jeep tour adventure starts with a comfortable pickup from your Hurghada hotel. You'll meet your friendly guide and fellow adventurers as you're driven toward the vast Egyptian desert, feeling the anticipation build for the thrilling experiences ahead.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (2:30 PM) – Desert Base Camp | 🎯 Activity | Quad Bike Practice Session
trip_itinerary.content: Arrive at the desert base camp where your adventure vehicles await. Test your skills on a quad bike during a comprehensive practice session, building confidence on the sandy terrain under expert guidance before your main desert exploration begins.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (3:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Independent ATV Adventure
trip_itinerary.content: Master the desert dunes during your 30-minute ATV ride, feeling the thrill of independent exploration across vast golden sands. Experience the freedom of navigating challenging terrain as you follow your guide through breathtaking desert landscapes.

trip_itinerary.title: Afternoon (3:30 PM) – Sandy Trails | 🎯 Activity | Shared Buggy Experience
trip_itinerary.content: Enjoy a 20-minute buggy ride through the desert, sharing the excitement with friends as you navigate sandy trails together. Feel the adrenaline rush as you conquer dunes in these powerful off-road vehicles before continuing deeper into the desert.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (3:50 PM) – Vast Desert | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Jeep Desert Safari
trip_itinerary.content: Navigate the desert in a powerful 4x4 jeep, conquering dramatic sand dunes with your skilled driver. Experience the rush of a true desert jeep tour as you traverse challenging terrain, feeling the vehicle's power beneath you on this authentic jeep desert safari.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (4:30 PM) – Traditional Settlement | 🏛️ Visit | Cultural Immersion
trip_itinerary.content: Explore an authentic Bedouin village after your jeep adventure, learning about traditional desert life and culture from the local inhabitants. Discover how these resilient people have thrived in the harsh desert environment for centuries.

trip_itinerary.title: Late Afternoon (5:00 PM) – Golden Dunes | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Sunset Camel Experience
trip_itinerary.content: Ride a gentle camel across the serene desert landscape, capturing perfect photos of the golden dunes during this quintessential Egyptian experience. Capture stunning desert sunset photos during your camel ride, with golden light illuminating the vast dunes for perfect travel memories.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (5:30 PM) – Traditional Camp | 🎯 Activity | Cultural Hospitality
trip_itinerary.content: Sip sweet Bedouin tea in their traditional camp, absorbing centuries-old hospitality customs as the desert sky transitions to twilight. This authentic experience connects you with desert traditions while you relax after your adventures.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (6:00 PM) – Desert Vista | 📸 Photo Stop | ⭐ Highlight | Golden Hour
trip_itinerary.content: Watch a breathtaking desert sunset as you relax before dinner. The sky transforms through shades of orange, pink, and purple, casting magical light across the endless dunes—a perfect moment for photography and reflection.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (6:30 PM) – Bedouin Tent | 🍽️ Meal | ⭐ Highlight | Traditional Feast
trip_itinerary.content: Savor a delicious BBQ dinner under the stars in a Bedouin tent, enjoying fresh Egyptian flavors after your desert adventures. This mouth-watering Egyptian meal in a traditional Bedouin-style tent features grilled meats, fresh salads, and authentic local dishes.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (7:30 PM) – Desert Night | 🎯 Activity | ⭐ Highlight | Desert Fire Show Tour
trip_itinerary.content: Be amazed by the exciting and colorful fire show that takes place under the stars. Watch skilled performers ignite the night with a dazzling fire show, feeling the desert heat as flames dance dramatically under the star-filled sky during this unforgettable desert fire show tour.

trip_itinerary.title: Evening (8:00 PM) – Hotel Return | 🚐 Transfer | Journey Conclusion
trip_itinerary.content: Board your comfortable vehicle for the return journey to Hurghada, reflecting on your incredible desert adventures. You'll be dropped off at your hotel with unforgettable memories of your jeep tour wadi rum-style desert experience.
